role_adherence_notes.linguistic: Correctly identified the absence of visible text and remained within the domain of script analysis.
role_adherence_notes.landscape: Focused on terrain, vegetation, and climate cues (taiga, sandy soil) without drifting into regulatory details.
role_adherence_notes.botanics: Analyzed specific tree species (Betula pendula, Pinus sylvestris) and their biogeographical distribution.
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: Evaluated road infrastructure (guardrails, reflectors, asphalt wear) and driving standards.

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: The pipeline correctly identified the ground truth (Russia). The specialists provided high-quality, domain-specific evidence (e.g., specific tree species, guardrail reflector details) that was effectively utilized by the tournament judge to distinguish the correct answer from close analogs like Finland and Canada.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: Accurately noted the lack of visible text.
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: Descriptions of mixed birch/conifer forests and sandy embankments match the image perfectly.
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: Species identification (Silver Birch, Scots Pine) is visually consistent with the image.
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: Descriptions of the W-beam guardrail and red reflectors are accurate.
